creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This should have been fixed by ports/170771 already.

I just tried building textproc/iksemel in poudriere and it worked correctly.

Can you please make sure your ports tree is up to date? Also run
'poudriere ports -u' to update the poudriere ports tree.

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
